summary.shape_sentence: Early stop-hunt flush below the open, fast reclaim, then a steady afternoon upside grind that closed near the high.

goat.note: Morning long from the stop-hunt reclaim off 26944.5.

red_circles.behavior: Late-morning bearish pivots appeared inside recovery chop but failed to reverse the session.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots aligned with reclaim and continuation, especially after midday acceptance above 27000.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27050-27060 was broken; upper supply near 27080-27095 was pushed into late.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Primary demand at 26944.5 was reclaimed and defended; secondary demand around 27000-27007 also held.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening stop-hunt damage was already being reversed; price was reclaiming from the 26944.5 low.
time_markers.12pm_red: Lunch began with price holding the reclaimed morning area around 27000 rather than failing back down.
time_markers.2pm_green: Renewed upside drive launched from the 27000/27007 support shelf.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed strong near the upper end of the session range.

takeaway: Bullish reclaim trend day with an early stop-hunt, defended demand, lunch hold, and late-session upside grind into the close.
